title: The Vicious Cycle of Digital Demand and Its Environmental Impact
description: This flowchart illustrates how the increasing consumer and business demand for faster, more reliable digital services drives a cycle of infrastructure expansion and energy consumption, challenging Green IT goals.
relationships: Rising User Demand for speed/reliability forces Data Center & Network Expansion, which leads to Increased Energy Consumption, resulting in a Higher Carbon Footprint. This, in turn, creates Pressure for Green IT Solutions to break the cycle.
